feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sale order is unable to delete.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Sale order is unable to delete in SAP Quality system.

Regards

Thanigai

entry.title: Automatic Stages on Freight Order TM
entry.content:
Dear Guru's

Can the TM in SAP S/4HANA RISE automatically fill stages for multidrop with multiple transporter? Because in LE-TRA we can set stages in the route configuration with multiple transporter

Thanks

entry.title: I accidentally added two options (UW00 & UE00) to the distribution chain, how to delete one of them
entry.content: I need help for I accidentally added two options (UW00 & UE00) to the distribution chain, but one of them should be in the next position. There's a delete button, but it's grayed out and unusable. How can I delete it? pls help me ，thank you very much

entry.title: VF44 - Edit Revenue List - rounding
entry.content:
When performing revenue recognition through transaction VF44, a difference of 0.01 is being generated in the revenue recognition posting.

Please see the attachments

Thank you

Márcia Asada

entry.title: BOQs(Bill of Quantities) | Order -Invoice | Bill of services |SAP SD Billing
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

My Client has a requirement to generate the sales invoice for below BOQs and send to the customer to in order to claim payment.

For different Customers some are materials and some are Services.

How can we segregate items subline items in the SAP documents and link pricing accordingly for main items along with subitems.

Kindly suggest how can we translate to sales invoice documents and take PDFs print for the below BOQs

screenshot services:

 

Examples:

CategoryItem No.Description of ItemsUnitBOQ QtyBOQ Rate
QuotedPremiumFinal
 1Group-A : Surface Works     
 2Dewatering During Construction     
C-V3Dewatering  of  Surface  Construction  Sites  including supply,    installation    and    removal    of    pumping equipment from the siteKWh5000002100%24
C-IV4Surface Excavation   100% 
C-IV5Common excavation**bleep**16100140100%140
C-IV6Rock excavation**bleep**18100550100%550
C-IV7Line drillingm5001030100%1030
C-IV8Dental excavation**bleep**1001050100%1,050
C-IV9Minor excavation**bleep**1001020100%1,020
C-IV10Removal of material arising from overbreak accepted due to geological conditions.**bleep**2300320100%320
C-IV11Extra for Haulage of excavated materials   100% 
C-IV12- Extra for haulage beyond 3 km upto 6 km**bleep**1000100100%100
C-II13Rock stabilization and Supports   100% 
C-II14Rock Anchors 25 mm dia, including accessories & testing   100% 
C-II15- Length upto 4.0 mm2800520100%520
C-II16- Length  more than 4.0 m upto 6.0 mm7500600100%600
C-II17Rock Anchors 32 mm dia including accessories & testing   100%0
C-II18- Length upto 6.0 mm500600100%600
C-II19- Length more than 6.0 m upto 9.0 mm1400710100%710

Material wise if required :

 

Best Regards

Raj Verma

entry.title: one time customer set up in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have requirement to set up one time customers and suppliers in SAP public cloud. we verified and found ACC group CPD is already maintained but BP role is not assigned and unable to add entries, option greyed out. 

Anyone help to set up one time customer/supplier. Kindly mention if i missed any config steps to fulfill.

 

Regards,

Rajesh

entry.title: Split Billing Documents Posting Into Multiple Accounting Documents
entry.content:
We understand that in SAP S/4HANA there is standard functionality available for billing document accounting split (GLO_IN_BILL_ISSUE_SPLIT / FI_BILL_ISSUE_SPLIT) which helps split FI accounting documents generated from SD billing documents when FI line item limits(999) are exceeded.

We have a similar business requirement in our ECC 617 system, where high-volume billing documents are causing FI document line item limitations.

entry.title: How to block the users from deleting the sales orders in SAP Public cloud?
entry.content:
We would like to restrict the business users from deleting the sales orders in SAP Public cloud. If the subsequent documents like delivery and invoice created, then the system will not allow. 

But if the subsequent document is not created, then it is possible to delete the sales order from the database.

We want to restrict this and advising users to reject the sales orders. Can anyone guide here?

We tried the implementing the BADI "SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE" but there is no importing parameter which says the deletion is triggered.

entry.title: D17388 Add 'Street2' in screen for selecting Ship-to in Sales order
entry.content:
Issue Description:

When selecting the correct Shipto (connected to Soldto) the field Street2 is missing

Please add 'Street 2' from the Customer Master to VA01: 

1. Shipto Selection screen (between Street and City)

2. Description of the Selected shipto:

entry.title: Sequential number for Customer.& Vendor invoice error
entry.content:
While recording an invoice for May, the user mistakenly set posting date on  05/21/2026 instead of 05/27/2026. The problem is that no check was triggered on NRIV sequentail number. (see the attached)

What can we do to prevent this from happening again in the future?

Best Regards.

Manola

entry.title: Enhancement in VF11
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My requirement is to enhance transaction VF11 during the Save action. I am using user exits SDVFX001 and SDVFX008 for this enhancement. However, I am getting a short dump during include activation. Could you please help me identify the issue and suggest the correct approach.

Additionally, if SDVFX001 and SDVFX008 are not suitable for VF11 save processing, please advise on the appropriate enhancement spot or user exit. 

I am changed SUBC to 'F' from 'I' in table PROGDIR. But still I am facing this issues.

Advance Thanks.

entry.title: Electricity resale. Negative PUP price.
entry.content:
hello guys,

We are in electricity resale process, with actual costing,  MM/SD only.

the process looks like this. 

period 1.

sell the electricity 10 mwh via SO.

buy the electricity 10mwh via PO.

period 2. 

since the electricity purchase price is determined there much delayed,  and when it comes, the GR from Period 1 is reversed, and posted with correct price in period 2.  Stock is always zero at period end because.. it is electricity.

Now, 

sometimes that brings a lot of funny stuff in actual costing period 2, like a line of "not distributed", that is because the the actual price at the given period can become 2, so price difference is not distributed. 

Requirement.
The business want this price difference to land on correct COPA segment, meaning on clients from period 1. 
The business does not want to deal with additional manual steps of credit price difference / debit COPA segment. 

Has anyone ever had a neat process design that also covers the challenge of delayed pricing?

thank you. 

Laimonas

entry.title: How did the field - Note in VKM1 gets filled in VKM1
entry.content: Need to understand the source of the field - Note in VKM1. And for few cases, that field is not filled. Business would like to have that field filled for all entries we get in VKM1

entry.title: Employee as BP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently in the Go-Live phase of our project, and the HR module has not yet been implemented. However, the customer has requested that their Sales Employees be created as Business Partners in the production system.

At present, can we create these Sales Employees as Business Partners without assigning the Employee role (BUP003)? If so, when SAP SuccessFactors (or the HR module) is implemented later, will it be possible to link these same Business Partner records to the HR employee master data instead of creating new records?

If this approach is feasible, I would appreciate guidance on the configurations, master data settings, and best practices that should be considered now to ensure a smooth future integration with SuccessFactors/HR. Specifically, I would like to understand any critical settings that should not be missed during the initial Business Partner creation process to avoid issues during employee synchronization and integration at a later stage.

Please share your recommendations and experiences.

Best Regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: I am facing the arror during pgi Please enter the Correct Freight ChargesMessage No. ZSD01000
entry.content:
Hii Exporters 
I am facing the error during pgi Please enter the Correct Freight Charges Message No. ZSD01000
Can you please provide resolution. 

charges i have completed 

This Error I am facing

entry.title: BOQ Upload VA01 (Sales Order) For Bill of services for more than 100 to 1000+ items
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

My Client is in the construction industry providing services which turns to be 100 to 1000+ sub-line items 

under Bill of services Structure and main item in the sales order .

How can i create a uploader to create sales order with sub-line items via excel .

Steps: VA01-> Select Item Activities ->Service Specification:Specs for order item 6 000010 Display opens ->Enter Short text , Qty. , Gross Price etc . ->Save the order .

screenshot 1

 

screenshot 2

 

 

Best Regards

Raj Verma

entry.title: Sales order hader text not editable
entry.content:
Login to QW1 :  VA02 : 11056800

Go to header > text > VA01 Internal Popup text ( grey out ) 

but other text is enable to edit eg : Shipping Instructions ( open to add more text )

entry.title: Debit Note process - intercompany Flow without delivery Order
entry.content:
Need to create a debit note with intercompany Process without delivery order.
required the financial Flow also

entry.title: VBOF showing error Log for Agreement 61634
entry.content:
HI Team,

 we need your help in resolving this standard error which is showing while executing the VBOF to update the sales volume for the rebate agreement 61634.

Error : System status CLSD is active.

Best Regard

Shyam Sunder Yaka

entry.title: Profit Center Missing on Customer Account Line Item in Accounting Document
entry.content:
EN
The accounting documents generated from a sales transaction do not have the **profit center** populated on the customer line item. However, the tax line items for that same transaction do have the profit center populated (BSEG - PRCTR).

How can I ensure that the customer line item is also populated with the profit center when the accounting document is generated?

Would this be handled through a system configuration, or would a validation (OB28) and/or custom development be required in SAP GUI?


PT-BR
Os documentos contábeis gerados a partir de uma venda estão sem o centro de lucro preenchido na linha do cliente. Entretanto, as linhas dos impostos dessa venda estão com o centro de lucro preenchido (BSEG - PRCTR). Como faço para que a linha do cliente também fique preenchida desde a geração do documento contábil? É alguma configuração ou uma validação (OB28)/desenvolvimento resolveria no SAP GUI?
